text.title: SaaS Stack Audit Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema (draft-07) for `SaaSAuditReport` — full-stack inventory + 5-bucket classification + signed kill-list + before/after spend.

example.code: { "audit_id": "audit-2026-Q2", "quarter": "2026-Q2", "header": {"owner": {"role": "founder", "person": "founder-handle"}, "last_reviewed": "2026-05-10", "version": "3.1"}, "inventory": [ {"tool_id": "linear", "vendor": "Linear", "monthly_cost_usd": 60, "last_login_days": 1, "tied_to_revenue": true, "duplicate_of": null, "bucket": "keep", "evidence": ["primary issue tracker for acme + bigco"]}, {"tool_id": "jira", "vendor": "Atlassian", "monthly_cost_usd": 35, "last_login_days": 64, "tied_to_revenue": false, "duplicate_of": "linear", "bucket": "cancel", "evidence": ["duplicate of linear; last login 64d"]}, {"tool_id": "loom-pro", "vendor": "Loom", "monthly_cost_usd": 16, "last_login_days": 130, "tied_to_revenue": false, "duplicate_of": null, "bucket": "suspend", "evidence": ["last login 130d; free tier sufficient"]}, {"tool_id": "harvest", "vendor": "Harvest", "monthly_cost_usd": 24, "last_login_days": 3, "tied_to_revenue": true, "duplicate_of": null, "bucket": "keep", "evidence": ["primary time tracker; feeds vendor-margin-defense"]}, {"tool_id": "notion", "vendor": "Notion", "monthly_cost_usd": 40, "last_login_days": 1, "tied_to_revenue": true, "duplicate_of": null, "bucket": "downgrade_seat", "evidence": ["5 seats but 3 active; downgrade to team plan"]} ], "kill_list": {"items": ["jira", "loom-pro"], "signed_by": "founder-handle", "signed_at": "2026-05-10"}, "spend_before": 175, "spend_forecast_after": 124, "review_log": [{"reviewed_at": "2026-05-10"}] }

example.note: Inventory < 5; keep without revenue tie or evidence; kill_list unsigned; stale review.
